Why families choose us

Built on care, discipline and big dreams

Everything we do is guided by our core values — excellence, integrity, respect, responsibility, discipline, innovation, teamwork and compassion.

1

Caring, qualified teachers

Dedicated staff who nurture every learner academically, socially, emotionally and spiritually.

2

Small class sizes

Every child is known by name, with continuous assessment so no learner is left behind.

3

Safe & secure environment

Spacious, well-ventilated classrooms, secure playgrounds and clean water and sanitation.

4

Affordable school fees

Quality education within reach for families in our community, with a strong parent-school partnership.

About our school

A strong foundation for every child

City on a Hill Academy is a private school in Zambia dedicated to quality, affordable and holistic education from Pre-Grade (Early Childhood Education) through the primary grades — with plans for continued growth into higher levels. We nurture every learner's academic potential while building strong character, creativity, leadership and lifelong learning skills.

VisionTo be a centre of excellence that provides quality education, develops responsible citizens, and prepares learners to succeed in a dynamic global society.
MissionLearner-centred, high-quality education through qualified teachers, innovative methods, and a supportive environment that promotes academic excellence, moral values, discipline and personal development.

"Learning Today, Leading Tomorrow."

Academic programmes

From first words to confident learners

Our programme follows the Zambian curriculum, enriched with practical learning that builds critical thinking, creativity, problem-solving and confident communication.

Early years

Pre-Grade

Children develop essential early literacy, numeracy, language and social skills through play-based, activity-oriented learning.

  • Play-based, hands-on classrooms
  • Early reading, counting and language
  • Secure playgrounds for little learners
Grades 1 and up

Primary Grades

A balanced education aligned with the Zambian curriculum, with continuous assessment so teachers can support every learner's progress.

  • Learner-centred, modern teaching methods
  • Technology and interactive resources
  • Library, reading and ICT opportunities
📚 Library & reading corner 💻 Computer & ICT learning 🏃 Sports & recreation 🚸 Secure playgrounds 💧 Clean water & sanitation 🌤️ Spacious classrooms
Beyond the classroom

We educate the whole child

From our marching band to the sports field, learners build confidence, teamwork and leadership through a full life of co-curricular activities.

  • Music, dance & drama — including our own school marching band
  • Football, netball & athletics and other sports
  • Debate & public speaking to grow confident voices
  • Cultural & heritage activities celebrating who we are
  • Educational tours — museums, the airport and beyond
  • Community service and environmental projects
School life

Every day is worth remembering

Careers Day, Heritage Day, Pajama Day, school trips — our calendar is full of moments that make learning joyful.
